title: Version Update - Master RBC Transfer
author: Opentrons
materials: Electron Microscopy Sciences Rectangular Staining Dish Slot
Upload your protocol into the OT App.

steps.title: Using the customizable parameters below, you...
steps.instruction: Using the customizable parameters below, you can specify which column to start picking up tips from and how many samples are in each run for each protocol. This protocol uses custom labware definitions for the glass trough (Electron Microscopy Sciences), Omegaquant 96-Well Plate, Blood Tube Rack, and 200ul Tip Rack. When downloading the protocol, the labware definitions (a JSON file) will be included for use with this protocol. For more information on using custom labware on the OT-2, please see this article: [Using labware in your protocols](https://support.opentrons.com/en/articles/3136506-using-labware-in-your-protocols) --- To purchase tips, reagents, or pipettes, please visit our [online store](https://shop.opentrons.com/) or contact our sales team at [info@opentrons.com](mailto:info@opentrons.com) * [Opentrons OT-2](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-robot/products/ot-2) * [Opentrons OT-2 Run App (Version 3.19.0 or later)](https://opentrons.com/ot-app/) * [Opentrons P50 Single-Channel Pipette](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes) * [Opentrons P50 Multi-Channel Pipette](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes) * [Opentrons 96 Tip Rack 300 µL](https://labware.opentrons.com/opentrons_96_tiprack_300ul?category=tipRack) * [Opentrons 300µL Tips](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-300ul-tips) * Electron Microscopy Sciences Rectangular Staining Dish [https://www.emsdiasum.com/microscopy/products/histology/staining.aspx#70314] * Omegaquant 96-Well Plate * Blood Tube Rack * 200ul Tip-Rack and Tips * Reagents --- Slot

steps.instruction: Download your protocol package containing the custom labware definitions for the reservoir and plates.

steps.title: Upload the labware definition in the OT App
steps.instruction: Upload the labware definition in the OT App. For help, please see this article.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
